title: Playwright E2E test suite
description: Cold-load empty state. Launch claude-pole → SSE-driven tile populate. Click jump → terminal launch attempt. Simulate Mac reboot → crash-recoverable status. Filter+sort+search. Settings persist. Federation: two daemons, cross-machine restore.

context.text: Implemented Playwright dashboard E2E coverage for cold empty state, SSE-driven session tile insertion, filter/search/sort assertions, settings persistence through restore, reboot recoverable jump launch, and two-daemon federation restore with HMAC negative cases plus real peer polling. Added /fed/dashboard/state account-refresh degradation so peer session state remains available when account refresh fails. Proof screenshots: ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-016-cold-load-empty-state.png, ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-016-sse-filter-sort.png, ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-016-reboot-recoverable.png. Gates: npm run build; npm run test:e2e:dashboard (6 passed); npm test -- --runInBand (102 suites, 2469 passed, 5 skipped); npm run typecheck:dashboard; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; swift build --package-path macos-menubar/SweechBar; git diff --check; stub/debug scan. Parallel code/security/integration reviews completed; Codex adversarial re-review on codex-pole returned no blockers.
